description: Use this API to change the value of a VAR of an auxiliary signal model of a specified FACTS device. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = change_fctsauxmod_var(fd, isgndx, model, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_fctsauxmod_var(fd, isgndx, model, j, rdata)

parameters.name: fd
parameters.description: Quoted name of the facts device receiving the of the auxiliary signal model; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: isgndx
parameters.description: Auxiliary signal injection point number, or the auxiliary signal index. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Var number to change relative to the start of the block of vars assigned to this model (1 for var(j), 2 for var(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New var value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: invalid ISGNDX value for a FACTS device.
no auxiliary signal model at this index for this FACTS device.
model at this index for this FACTS device is aaa not xxx.
VAR number outside of the VAR range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
